title: Love
tmdbOverview: Murphy is an American living in Paris who enters a highly sexually and emotionally charged relationship with the unstable Electra. Unaware of the seismic effect it will have on their relationship, they invite their pretty neighbor into their bed.
synopsis: Love (2015) is a drama and romance film from France. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a NC-17 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
